title: A Spice Market Flair in Antep
description: Spend a themed day in Gaziantep: Almacı Market, Bakırcılar Bazaar, İmam Çağdaş Kebab and Baklava Salon, Köz Antep Kunafeh - Kadaif.
notes: Start your day amidst the aromatic scents of spices.
Experience the sound of hammering alongside copper craftsmanship.
Baklava and kebabs: the essence of Antep.
A sweet finale with warm kunafeh.
Free public restrooms in the bazaar area.
